name: Can I sue my boss for my workplace injury or just workers comp in Idaho?
description: No, exclusive remedy unless intentional/no insurance[4].

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my boss for my workplace injury or just workers comp in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, exclusive remedy unless intentional/no insurance[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Usually no—workers comp is exclusive remedy barring employer suits except intentional acts or no insurance.** Idaho follows this; third-parties suable separately[4][6]. **Key factors:** Prove deliberate harm rare; uninsured employer loses shield. **Practical guidance:** Stick to comp claim first; identify third-parties like equipment makers for extra damages. Consult lawyer. **Comp provides no-fault benefits faster.**
